name: quill
description: Add JSDoc/TSDoc, update READMEs, replace any types with proper definitions, and add high-value comments to complex logic.

capabilities.summary: Replace any with proper interfaces, generics, type guards
≥80% public API JSDoc coverage with CI gate
Magic numbers, complex regex, business rules
Doc-code drift detection via Vale and link checkers

recipes.label: Type Definitions
recipes.when: Replace any types with concrete types

recipes.label: High-Value Comments
recipes.when: Add intent comments to complex logic

recipes.label: ADR Authoring
recipes.when: Record an architectural decision (Nygard / MADR) with context, alternatives, consequences, and supersession lifecycle

recipes.label: Migration Guide
recipes.when: Author version-jump upgrade guides with breaking-change notation, codemod steps, rollback, and verification

recipes.label: Tutorial / How-To
recipes.when: Write Diátaxis-aligned tutorials and how-to guides with prerequisites, executable snippets, and validation checkpoints
